headline: CooperCompanies (NASDAQ:COO) Reports Q4 CY2025 In Line With Expectations
summary: Medical device company CooperCompanies (NASDAQ:COO) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q4 CY2025, with sales up 6.2% year on year to $1.02 billion. The company’s outlook for the full year was close to analysts’ estimates with revenue guided to $4.33 billion at the midpoint. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.10 per share was 6.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: CooperCompanies Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
summary: SAN RAMON, Calif., March 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CooperCompanies (Nasdaq: COO), a leading global medical device company, today announced financial results for its fiscal first quarter ended January 31, 2026. First quarter 2026 revenue of $1.024 billion, up 6%, or up 3% organically, from last year's first quarter.First quarter 2026 GAAP diluted earnings per share (EPS) of $0.66, up $0.14 or 27% from last year's first quarter.First quarter 2026 Non-GAAP diluted EPS of $1.10, up $0.18 or 20% f
